allow: Bash(echo "===== 全列表里图像相关模型 =====" *)
Bash(cp "/c/Users/61614/Downloads/Q版棕色毛绒小熊角色.mp4" public/bear/idle.mp4)
Bash(cp "/c/Users/61614/Downloads/Q版棕色毛绒小熊角色 \(1\).mp4" public/bear/talking.mp4)
Bash(cp "/c/Users/61614/Downloads/Q版棕色毛绒小熊角色 \(2\).mp4" public/bear/drawing.mp4)

Bash(ffmpeg -y -hide_banner -loglevel error -i public/bear/idle.mp4 -vf colorkey=0x000000:0.12:0.06,scale=400:-2,format=yuva420p -c:v libvpx-vp9 -pix_fmt yuva420p -b:v 0 -crf 34 -an public/bear/idle.webm)
Bash(ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries stream=pix_fmt,width,height -of csv=p=0 public/bear/idle.webm)

Bash(ffmpeg -y -hide_banner -loglevel error -i public/bear/idle.mp4 -vf format=rgba,colorkey=0x000000:0.16:0.10,scale=400:-2 -c:v libvpx-vp9 -pix_fmt yuva420p -auto-alt-ref 0 -b:v 0 -crf 34 -an public/bear/idle.webm)
Bash(ffmpeg -y -hide_banner -loglevel error -f lavfi -i color=red:s=400x712 -i public/bear/idle.webm -filter_complex [0][1]overlay=shortest=1 -frames:v 1 docs/_alpha_check.png)

Bash(ffmpeg -y -hide_banner -loglevel error -i public/bear/idle.mp4 -vf format=rgba,colorkey=0x000000:0.18:0.10,scale=400:-2 -c:v libvpx -pix_fmt yuva420p -auto-alt-ref 0 -b:v 1500k -an public/bear/idle.webm)
Bash(ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries stream=pix_fmt -of csv=p=0 public/bear/idle.webm)
Bash(ffmpeg -y -hide_banner -loglevel error -f lavfi -i color=0x33aa33:s=400x712 -i public/bear/idle.webm -filter_complex [0][1]overlay=shortest=1 -frames:v 1 docs/_v8check.png)
